title: What a Man of God Does When He's Wrong
caption:
A man of God doesn't win the argument. He owns the wrong.

Not the soft version: "I'm sorry if you felt..." That's a defense wearing a mask. Own it clean or don't own it at all. Three words with nothing after them.

And don't wait to feel ready. Pride never picks a good time. The delay is usually just you hoping it gets buried. It doesn't. It roots deeper.

Go first. Absorb the cost. Let the other person hold whatever they need to. You've done your part, and you don't need credit for it.

"Be kind to one another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another, as God in Christ forgave you." Ephesians 4:32.

Save this for the apology you've been putting off.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipline #scripture #christianity #humility
theme: He leads by going first into the cost
